title: Line Go Up
description:
Dodge shareholder demands and global calamities to rule the free market in this roguelike deckbuilder!

Make the Line Go Up

• Buy companies and hire executives

• Acquire competitors

• Call bluffs or raise your own in the free market

• Invest in projects and see where fate lands (or parry the market if you're brave)

• Fire employees to appease the shareholders (but not so many that it scares them off)

• Respond to unexpected events and hope there are no consequences–there's only one way to find out

And more!

Variety

• Over a hundred companies in 4 industries

• Dozens of market events to leverage against competitors

• A thousand unique project combinations to invest into

• Several mini-games

• 20+ unique incidents to respond to

• Infinite ways to deliver shareholder value

• And plenty of ways to end humanity!

The Goal

Can you get rich by dominating all four industries without dooming us all?
description_short: Play as a CEO where you buy companies & hire executives to build out your deck, then test your luck in the free market. Bad gambles may push you to make tough choices in the events that pop up along the way. You will get fired if you fail to meet expectations, so make that line go up!
